nasb.text: And the Lord said to me, “Proclaim all these words in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem, saying, ‘Hear the words of this covenant and do them.

esv.text: And the Lord said to me, “Proclaim all these words in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem: Hear the words of this covenant and do them.

cnv.text: 耶和華又對我說：“你要在猶大各城中和耶路撒冷的街道上，宣告這一切話，說：‘你們要聽從、遵行這約的話。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“你要在犹大各城和耶路撒冷的街头宣告，呼吁百姓听从、遵行这约。
